Description:
A modular component of standard robotic vision systems. Optical assemblies on most Robotek units are built from interchangeable fragments — sensors, lens elements, processing modules — designed for fast field replacement during maintenance.

A loose fragment by itself is rarely useful to anyone except the unit it came from. Optical assemblies are unit-specific: a fragment from one model is unlikely to fit another, and the recalibration overhead of mismatched parts is, by industry consensus, "more trouble than the eyesight is worth."

A robot missing one is functionally blind in the relevant sector. A robot missing several is, in the technical sense, asking nicely.
